ValidationRule.description: NPS is answered on a 0-10 scale, CSAT on 1-5. Out-of-range values would corrupt the account NPS aggregation.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND(ISPICKVAL(Type__c, "NPS"), OR(Score__c < 0, Score__c > 10)), AND(ISPICKVAL(Type__c, "CSAT"), OR(Score__c < 1, Score__c > 5)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Score is out of range: NPS must be 0-10, CSAT must be 1-5.
